name: brand-icons
description: Brand icon and visual identity management — generates favicons, app icons, OG images, and social media avatars from brand assets with consistent visual identity.

mode.description: Skill mode: generate (full icon set), og-image (Open Graph image), audit (missing assets check), social (platform-specific images)

source.description: Path to source image (SVG or PNG, minimum 512x512 for best results)

title.description: Title text for OG image generation (max 60 characters)

project_path.description: Project directory to audit for brand assets

platform.description: Social media platform for profile/banner generation
